allowed: B2 clip-level legacy Class posterior measurement and multi-seed analysis
same-forward feature-lineage engineering and Class internal readout
legacy clip-level Material continuity 2AFC where strict metadata matching is feasible

class_measurement.coarse_posterior: sum mapped 527 sigmoid outputs by legacy coarse group; persist raw sums and sum-normalized vector; neither replaces the frozen hard-label rule
class_measurement.video_baseline: pairwise confident agreement over the 17 B2 base-final labels for that video
crossings: first sampled progress at or above threshold
first sampled progress at or above threshold that remains above at every later scorable point

exploratory_replication_labels.stable_across_seeds: pooled sustained crossing <=0.45, historical 0.35 is within the video-bootstrap interval or one sampled step of the point estimate, >=0.80 of seed curves cross by 0.45, and seed variance is <0.25 of identifiable total
exploratory_replication_labels.heterogeneous_but_directionally_consiste: pooled sustained crossing <=0.45 and >=0.60 of seed curves cross by 0.45, but the stable criteria fail
exploratory_replication_labels.strongly_seed_dependent: seed variance is at least video variance or fewer than 0.60 but at least 0.25 of seed curves cross by 0.45
exploratory_replication_labels.not_reproduced: pooled sustained crossing >0.45 or fewer than 0.25 of seed curves cross by 0.45

gating_comparisons: same-native-tensor original fp32 pooling vs repaired fp32 pooling
stored Tweedie vs same-order reducer recomputation
stored derived attention summary vs same-contract reducer recomputation
corresponding exact-packet replay outputs across registered devices/repeats
forbidden_identity_comparisons: independently regenerated states with different hashes
recomputed attention probabilities vs fused attention output

full_recollection.population: 48 B2 videos x 17 base seeds x 8 progress points

targets.primary: unique confident fork-majority Class at the current B2 state; >=2 confident forks; ties/insufficient support are missing

class_readout.selection_metric: inner-fold balanced accuracy; ties choose lower capacity then stronger regularization
class_readout.information_readout: earliest progress whose paired video-bootstrap lower 95% bound exceeds both the null and conditioning-only baselines

material_continuity.candidate_population: 200 clips x 4 subjects x 8 progress points
material_continuity.positive: same-video retained final Material embeddings excluding the candidate subject ID
material_continuity.negative: different video, exact confident coarse Class, different admissible UCS material category, same AudioSet category/source type/discrete status
material_continuity.loudness_covariate: deterministic RMS dBFS derived from retained original MP4 audio before any candidate replay or margin measurement
material_continuity.selection_tiebreak: difficulty, normalized timing distance plus loudness distance, SHA256('material-negative-v1:'+candidate_id+':'+negative_id)
